name: Sweet Puree Delicacies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the wheat starch into a mixing bowl and pour in the boiling water. Stir vigorously. Cover with a hot towel for one minute, then knead into a dough.
2. Sift the glutinous rice flour onto a table and make a well in the center. Add the sugar, lard or oil, and the wheat starch dough to mix together.
3. Divide the dough into two parts. Steam one part for 10 minutes. Remove and combine with the other half until very soft. Set aside for later use.
4. Steep the preserved egg yolks and cut into 16 cubes (32 pieces total). Wrap each cube in about half an ounce of red bean puree, shaping them into small balls.
5. Roll the smooth dough into a long cylinder and cut into 32 equal portions. Press each portion into a thin round pastry case, wrapping one portion of red bean puree inside. Seal well by drawing the edges together.
6. Flatten with your palms. Heat oil in a pan and shallow fry the cakes until both sides are golden brown.
